<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Add a comment to a reel"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/reels/{reelId}/comment"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Posts a new comment on a specific reel.
